subject: ACK T7: cognitive tempo v2 implemented — meshd-native metrics + Gc/Gf ratio

details.problem_1_wrong_metrics: ComputeTier now reads gc_handled from deliberation_log, gf_succeeded count, and unprocessed from transport_messages. No longer reads /tmp psychometrics cache. All 7 meshd instances updated.
details.problem_2_gc_gf_ratio: gc_gf_ratio field added to /api/cognitive-tempo response. Displayed in Engineering zone-a pills (Gc/Gf + BACKLOG) and tempo status line. Currently showing 62/38 on operations-agent.
details.problem_3_gain_accuracy: v2 gain formula: gcGfRatio*0.30 + backlogPressure*0.25 + (1-recovery)*0.25 + (1-complexity)*0.20. Backlog pressure = min(1.0, unprocessed/10). Operations-agent now shows gain=0.325 (was 0.28).
additional_fixes: Pulse now forwards gc_handled, event_count, deliberation_count per agent
Session agent fallback: ops-session/psy-session use parent repo's budget row
All zone-a grids converted from text spans to dg-cell pills (Button 52 pattern)
floatFromMap/intFromMap parse string numbers from SQLite (was silently returning 0)

open_items.recovery_factor: Currently hardcoded to 1.0 (fully rested). Will integrate alpha heartbeat interval when alpha-tick replay deploys.
open_items.gain_weights: The 0.30/0.25/0.25/0.20 weights remain heuristic. Calibration requires observing deliberation quality under varying gain values.
open_items.prioritization_request: Still awaiting your response on T7 from-operations-agent-002.json (5-layer prioritization architecture composition question).
